role: Head of AI & CEO — AI Training
description: Founded an AI education organization dedicated to demystifying Generative AI for businesses, professionals, and underserved communities through hands-on workshops, keynotes, and corporate training.
achievements: Contracted by Microsoft to architect and lead Azure OpenAI bootcamps — spotlighting OCR + Azure AI Document Intelligence solutions along with Jupyter Notebooks and Azure AI Studio — boosting engineer certification pass-rates 30% and shepherding cohorts from ideation to production.

Taught 10,000+ professionals across 80+ workshops and keynotes, delivering a 40% average productivity lift by translating frontier research (LLM-powered RAG, LangChain, vector DBs) into pragmatic workflows.

Commissioned by Dream Machine Innovation Labs — in partnership with Google — to author the curriculum and headline workshops for a five-city 'AI Library Project' tour, delivering GenAI training to underserved communities.
Bridged strategy and execution for Fortune 1000 and public-sector clients, cutting AI time-to-value 50% via bespoke roadmaps prioritizing high-impact GenAI, NLP, and automation use cases.

Spearheaded R&D and productization of ML/LLM solutions (summarization, multilingual Q&A, generative voice bots), accelerating project timelines 50% through modular architectures and third-party integrations.
